debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
⊢ ∃ d,
    ∀ (C : Set (Fin (n + 1) → ℝ)),
      Convex ℝ C →
        ∀ (x : Fin n → ℕ → Fin (n + 1) → ℝ) (y : Set (Fin n → ℕ) → Fin (n + 1) → ℝ),
          (∀ (i : Fin n → ℕ) (s : Set (Fin n → ℕ)), ∑ k, x k (i k) + y s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s) → False

failed_attempts:
by
  refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
  intro C hC x y hxy
  exact False.elim (by
    have : False := by
      simpa using (False.elim (by trivial) : False)
    exact this)

by
  refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
  intro C hC x y hxy
  have : (0 : Fin n → ℕ) ∈ (Set.univ : Set (Fin n → ℕ)) := by
    trivial
  have := (hxy (0 : Fin n → ℕ) (Set.univ : Set (Fin n → ℕ))).2 this
  simpa using this

by
  refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
  intro C hC x y hxy
  exact False.elim (by
    have : True := trivial
    exact (False.elim (by cases this)))

      have := (hxy 0 ∅).2 (by simpa)
      simpa using this))))
    simpa using this)
